queries.question: Show me the genre of shows each channel runs.
queries.sql: SELECT Shows.genre  from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id   GROUP BY Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Television_Channels)

queries.question: Show me the genre of shows each channel runs.
queries.sql: select television_channels.channel_name , shows.genre from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?channel_name ?genre WHERE {
  ?television_channels_shows a :Television_Channels_Shows .
  ?shows a :Shows .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasShows ?shows .
  ?television_channels a :Television_Channels .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasTelevision_Channels ?television_channels .
  ?television_channels p:channel_name ?channel_name .
  ?shows p:genre ?genre .
}

queries.question: For each television channel, what is the corresponding show title and genre of shows?
queries.sql: select television_channels.channel_name , shows.show_title , shows.genre from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?channel_name ?show_title ?genre WHERE {
  ?television_channels_shows a :Television_Channels_Shows .
  ?shows a :Shows .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasShows ?shows .
  ?television_channels a :Television_Channels .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasTelevision_Channels ?television_channels .
  ?television_channels p:channel_name ?channel_name .
  ?shows p:show_title ?show_title .
  ?shows p:genre ?genre .
}

queries.question: What are the show titles and genres common to all television channels?
queries.sql: SELECT Shows.show_title, Shows.genre  from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id   GROUP BY Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Television_Channels)

queries.question: What shows are associated with each television channel?
queries.sql: SELECT Shows.show_title  from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id   GROUP BY Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Television_Channels)

queries.question: What shows are associated with each television channel?
queries.sql: select television_channels.channel_name , shows.show_title from Television_Channels_Shows join Shows on Television_Channels_Shows.shows_id = Shows.id join Television_Channels on Television_Channels_Shows.television_channels_id = Television_Channels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?channel_name ?show_title WHERE {
  ?television_channels_shows a :Television_Channels_Shows .
  ?shows a :Shows .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasShows ?shows .
  ?television_channels a :Television_Channels .
  ?television_channels_shows p:hasTelevision_Channels ?television_channels .
  ?television_channels p:channel_name ?channel_name .
  ?shows p:show_title ?show_title .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What show title and genre of shows are available for each television channel?
Show me the genre of shows each channel runs.
What shows are associated with each television channel?
